facebook.caption: If you've ever wanted to explore the underwater world around Phu Quoc, Ecodive Vietnam - Trung Tâm Lặn Phú Quốc is the place to start. Rated 4.9 out of 5 across 62 reviews, this dive center has earned a reputation as one of the most trusted spots on the island for both beginners and certified divers. Whether you're taking your first breath underwater or logging another dive, the team here is known for making every session feel safe and welcoming. Practical tip: book ahead, especially during peak season, as spots fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the bubbles rise and the coral come to life. This is what diving with Ecodive Vietnam - Trung Tâm Lặn Phú Quốc actually looks like, and it's every bit as good as that 4.9-star rating suggests. From the briefing on shore to the moment you drop below the surface, the whole experience is smooth, professional, and genuinely memorable.

instagram.caption: 4.9 stars and 62 happy divers don't lie. Ecodive Vietnam - Trung Tâm Lặn Phú Quốc is where Phu Quoc's underwater world opens up, whether it's your first dive or your fiftieth. Book ahead during peak season.
instagram.video_caption: Bubbles, coral, and clear warm water. Ecodive Vietnam - Trung Tâm Lặn Phú Quốc takes you beneath the surface of Phu Quoc in the best possible way. Rated 4.9 stars for a reason.
